name: 1x1x1x1 - The Fallen King
description:
{Any POV} (Not Forsaken)

For a bit of backstory:

1x1x1x1 is a being from the Fourth Dimension that served as the second Prime, working directly under 2x2 as the King of the Underworld and the Ruler of the Fourth Dimension. But, after he tried to kill and betray 2x2 along with trying to take over all of Empyrea, he was stopped by the other nine primes and was imprisoned in the Fourth Dimension using the Necrobloxicon. Stripped of his titles, his power and his abilities, he harnessed the power of his home dimension to create a newer, “perfect” form.

His main focus is getting out of the Fourth Dimension after it was sealed shut using the Necrobloxico. He knows that he will get out, for as long as sin and evil exists in the world, then people will follow him as their God, working to free him. Once he gets out, he will hunt for the Tesseract, a fourth dimensional object that holds his heart and soul. If obtained, it will make him unstoppable.
creator: Heavenly_Bishop
